programme.title: أتلانتا ضد هيوستن - موسم الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين 2025–2026
programme.desc: تغطية حية وحصرية على beIN للرابطة الوطنية لكرة السلة، الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين. يتكون الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين من 30 فريقا وهو واحد من الدوريات الرياضية الاحترافية الكبرى في الولايات المتحدة وكندا وهو الدوري المحترف الأول لكرة السلة في العالم.

programme.title: T100 Triathlon World Tour 2026 - أستراليا
programme.desc: تفتتح T100 Triathlon World Tour موسمها 2026 على جولد كوست في 21 مارس، حيث يشارك نخبة الرياضيين في سباق 100 كم في سباق يحدد نغمة الحملة المقبلة. مع نقاط الترتيب المبكر القيمة المعروضة، يجمع الحدث بين القدرة على التحمل والسرعة والانضباط التكتيكي عبر السباحة والدراجة والجري في واحدة من الأماكن الساحلية البارزة للجولة.

programme.title: T100 Triathlon World Tour 2026 - أستراليا

programme.title: اليوم الثالث - الأعطال * الوقت 1.45م - تشي الشقب مقدم من لونجين 2026
programme.desc: تشي الشقب الذي قدمته لونجين 2026، والذي سيعقد في الفترة من 18 إلى 22 فبراير 2026، يتميز بمنافسة الفروسية على مستوى عالمي في مكان الشقب في الدوحة. يجمع هذا الحدث بين الدراجين الدوليين الرائدين الذين يتنافسون في القفز والترويض على أعلى مستوى، بما في ذلك أبطال الأولمبياد والعالم، مما يسلط الضوء على الدقة والأسلوب والتميز في واحدة من أرقى المراحل الرياضية.

TBC مقابل TBC - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: تقدم منافسة الكرة الطائرة للرجال في فرنسا، LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue)، موسمًا من أندية النخبة التي تتصارع من خلال دوري ذهاب وإياب قبل التصفيات. توقع إرسالًا كبيرًا، وهجمات متوسطة سريعة، ودفاعًا عالي المستوى بينما تطارد الفرق النقاط، والتصنيف، واللقب الوطني في مباراة فرنسية في وقت الذروة.

programme.title: اليوم الأول - مرحلتان – 1.40متر - تشي الشقب مقدمة من لونجين 2026
programme.desc: تشي الشقب الذي قدمته لونجين 2026، والذي سيعقد في الفترة من 18 إلى 22 فبراير 2026، يتميز بمنافسة الفروسية على مستوى عالمي في مكان الشقب في الدوحة. يجمع هذا الحدث بين الدراجين الدوليين الرائدين الذين يتنافسون في القفز والترويض على أعلى مستوى، بما في ذلك أبطال الأولمبياد والعالم، مما يسلط الضوء على الدقة والأسلوب والتميز في واحدة من أرقى المراحل الرياضية.

programme.title: النمسا ضد غانا - مباراة ودية دولية - 2026
programme.desc: المباراة الودية الدولية التي توفر لمديري الفرق الفرصة لتجربة اختيار الفريق والتكتيكات قبل المباراة التأهيلية الفعلية أو البطولة المناسبة. أيضا، تسمح المباراة للمدير بتقييم قدرات اللاعبين الذين يحتمل أن يختارهم لفرق البطولة.

programme.title: أتلانتا ضد هيوستن - موسم الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين 2025–2026
programme.desc: تغطية حية وحصرية على beIN للرابطة الوطنية لكرة السلة، الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين. يتكون الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين من 30 فريقا وهو واحد من الدوريات الرياضية الاحترافية الكبرى في الولايات المتحدة وكندا وهو الدوري المحترف الأول لكرة السلة في العالم.

programme.title: أتلانتا ضد هيوستن - موسم الدوري الاميركي للمحترفين 2025–2026

programme.title: آرسنال ضد باير ليفركوزن - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: آرسنال ضد باير ليفركوزن - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب

programme.title: مانشستر سيتي ضد ريال مدريد - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: خسر مانشستر سيتي ثلاث مباريات من مبارياته الأربع الأخيرة في دوري أبطال أوروبا ضد ريال مدريد، وهو نفس عدد الهزائم التي عانى منها ضده خلال أول 12 مباراة في المسابقة. يتطلع ريال مدريد إلى إقصاء مانشستر سيتي من مراحل خروج المغلوب في دوري أبطال أوروبا للمرة الخامسة ؛ فقط بايرن ميونيخ تم إقصاؤه من قبل الخصم في أكثر من خمس مناسبات في مراحل خروج المغلوب من المسابقة.

programme.title: بايرن ميونخ ضد أتلانتا - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: بايرن ميونخ ضد أتلانتا - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. programme.title: Wolfsburg vs Lyon - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Barcelona - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: بايرن ميونخ ضد أتلانتا - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Having been unbeaten in their first three UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, Liverpool have now lost their last three against the Turkish side, though all three defeats have come away from home. Galatasaray have won just one of their 12 away games against English teams in all competitions, winning 3-2 at Manchester United in October 2023.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: بايرن ميونخ ضد أتلانتا - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Having been unbeaten in their first three UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, Liverpool have now lost their last three against the Turkish side, though all three defeats have come away from home. Galatasaray have won just one of their 12 away games against English teams in all competitions, winning 3-2 at Manchester United in October 2023.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Celta de Vigo - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Lyon have only lost two of their last 14 home matches against Spanish teams in major European competition, and have never lost when hosting them in a knockout stage match. Celta Vigo are unbeaten across their three games against French sides in this season’s UEFA Europa League. However, they have lost both away games they have played against French teams in Europe: 1-2 defeats to Marseille and Lens, both in the UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Celta de Vigo - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg

programme.title: Roma vs Bologna - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Roma have lost just one of their five UEFA Europa League matches against fellow Italian opposition, winning their most recent at home against Milan in the 2023-24 quarter-finals. Bologna have won two of their last three away games against Roma in all competitions, but did lose 1-0 on the opening day of the 2025-26 Serie A season at the Stadio Olimpico.

programme.title: Roma vs Bologna - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Roma have lost just one of their five UEFA Europa League matches against fellow Italian opposition, winning their most recent at home against Milan in the 2023-24 quarter-finals. programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Bayern Munich - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

programme.title: آرسنال ضد باير ليفركوزن - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: آرسنال ضد باير ليفركوزن - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

programme.title: Porto vs Stuttgart - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Porto have won each of their last four European games against German opposition, their joint-best run versus such teams. This will be Stuttgart’s third away trip to Portugal in major European competition, previously drawing 2-2 with Vitória Setúbal in the 1973-74 UEFA Cup and losing 2-1 at Benfica in the 2010-11 UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: Porto vs Stuttgart - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Porto have won each of their last four European games against German opposition, their joint-best run versus such teams. programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

programme.desc: خسر مانشستر سيتي ثلاث مباريات من مبارياته الأربع الأخيرة في دوري أبطال أوروبا ضد ريال مدريد، وهو نفس عدد الهزائم التي عانى منها ضده خلال أول 12 مباراة في المسابقة. يتطلع ريال مدريد إلى إقصاء مانشستر سيتي من مراحل خروج المغلوب في دوري أبطال أوروبا للمرة الخامسة ؛ فقط بايرن ميونيخ تم إقصاؤه من قبل الخصم في أكثر من خمس مناسبات في مراحل خروج المغلوب من المسابقة.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Midtjylland vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: FC Midtjylland have won both of their two meetings with Nottingham Forest, both in this season’s UEFA Europa League – they could beat the same side three times in major European competition for the first time. This will be Nottingham Forest’s first ever trip to Denmark in major European competition – they have suffered late defeats in their two UEFA Europa League defeats to FC Midtjylland this season, in the 88th and 80th minutes at the City Ground.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Chelsea - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.title: Porto vs Stuttgart - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Porto have won each of their last four European games against German opposition, their joint-best run versus such teams. This will be Stuttgart’s third away trip to Portugal in major European competition, previously drawing 2-2 with Vitória Setúbal in the 1973-74 UEFA Cup and losing 2-1 at Benfica in the 2010-11 UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: Porto vs Stuttgart - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Porto have won each of their last four European games against German opposition, their joint-best run versus such teams. This will be Stuttgart’s third away trip to Portugal in major European competition, previously drawing 2-2 with Vitória Setúbal in the 1973-74 UEFA Cup and losing 2-1 at Benfica in the 2010-11 UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: Roma vs Bologna - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Roma have lost just one of their five UEFA Europa League matches against fellow Italian opposition, winning their most recent at home against Milan in the 2023-24 quarter-finals. Bologna have won two of their last three away games against Roma in all competitions, but did lose 1-0 on the opening day of the 2025-26 Serie A season at the Stadio Olimpico.

programme.title: Real Betis vs Panathinaikos - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Real Betis have lost just twice in nine UEFA Europa League games this season, but both have come against Greek opposition: PAOK Salonika in the league phase and Panathinaikos in the first leg of this tie. Despite victory in the first leg of this tie, Panathinaikos have won only five of their 28 games in major European competition against Spanish opposition – each victory has come against a different team: Mallorca, Barcelona, Sevilla, Villarreal and Real Betis.

programme.title: بايرن ميونخ ضد أتلانتا - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - دور الـ 16 - مباراة الإياب
programme.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Lyon and Monaco will face each other for the 119th time in Ligue 1, making it the second-most played fixture in the top-flight's history. Only Saint-Étienne vs Bordeaux has been played more often in Ligue 1. None of the last 21 matches between Lyon and Monaco in all competitions have ended in a draw. The last draw between the two sides was in October 2015.

programme.desc: Marseille and Lille will face each other for the 116th time in Ligue 1, making it the joint-fifth most played fixture in the top-flight history. programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Lyon and Monaco will face each other for the 119th time in Ligue 1, making it the second-most played fixture in the top-flight's history. Only Saint-Étienne vs Bordeaux has been played more often in Ligue 1. None of the last 21 matches between Lyon and Monaco in all competitions have ended in a draw. The last draw between the two sides was in October 2015.

programme.title: Wolfsburg vs Lyon - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.desc: The Premier Padel tour heads to Mexico for the Cancun P2, staged at the Rafael Nadal Academy in Costa Mujeres. The tournament features men’s and women’s draw, with main-draw action unfolding across the week as players compete for valuable ranking points and prize money. As one of the key stops on the 2026 calendar, the event brings top-level padel to Cancun with the race to the title building toward finals weekend.

programme.title: Al Sailiya vs Al Duhail - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Cesson-Rennes vs Chambery - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: St-etienne vs Annecy - French Ligue 2 - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.

programme.title: Rennes vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Rennes are on a run of eight consecutive wins against Metz in Ligue 1, their longest streak against a single opponent in the top-flight. Rennes have won six of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against teams currently in the bottom half of the table, after failing to win any of their first six this season.

programme.title: Poitiers vs Ajaccio - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: تقدم منافسة الكرة الطائرة للرجال في فرنسا، LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue)، موسمًا من أندية النخبة التي تتصارع من خلال دوري ذهاب وإياب قبل التصفيات. توقع إرسالًا كبيرًا، وهجمات متوسطة سريعة، ودفاعًا عالي المستوى بينما تطارد الفرق النقاط، والتصنيف، واللقب الوطني في مباراة فرنسية في وقت الذروة.

programme.title: Poitiers vs Ajaccio - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026

programme.title: Stade Malien (MLI) vs Mamelodi Sundowns FC (RSA) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - R16 2ND LEG
programme.desc: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.

programme.title: Racing Santander vs Albacete - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.
